The '''Hebine Ring''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Hebeth]] and [[Beheboth]] in the [[Beheboth system/Legends|Beheboth system]]. An ancient [[Sith observatory|observatory]] was built by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] in one of the larger asteroids.

{{Loc-stub}}
